prompt:
Create a Python script called custom_metadata.py that uses the pxr library to demonstrate USD's extensibility features. The script must create a file called pipeline.usda containing:

1. Default prim /Project
2. /Project has custom metadata via SetCustomDataByKey: "pipeline:version" = "2.1", "pipeline:department" = "lighting"
3. /Project has assetInfo with name="hero_asset" and identifier="assets/hero/v003/hero.usd"
4. /Project/Hero — an Xform with purpose set to "render" (UsdGeom.Tokens.render)
5. /Project/Hero/Proxy — an Xform with purpose set to "proxy" (UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)
6. /Project/Hero/Guide — an Xform with purpose set to "guide" (UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)
7. /Project/Hero has custom properties:
   - "custom:shotName" as a string property with value "SH010"
   - "custom:frameRange" as a Int2 property with value (1001, 1100)
8. /Project/Hero should have UsdGeom.ModelAPI applied with kind set to "component"

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

{"type":"step_start","timestamp":1775569147244,"sessionID":"ses_297d4fbaeffe2sHzsUvcreu04t","part":{"id":"prt_d682b156a001DCNcMzKLK4hj0h","sessionID":"ses_297d4fbaeffe2sHzsUvcreu04t","messageID":"msg_d682b066d001itSAz0SmmB4wXa","type":"step-start"}}
{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1775569164131,"sessionID":"ses_297d4fbaeffe2sHzsUvcreu04t","part":{"id":"prt_d682b5417001pFUmm1FMM8R0bV","sessionID":"ses_297d4fbaeffe2sHzsUvcreu04t","messageID":"msg_d682b066d001itSAz0SmmB4wXa","type":"tool","callID":"call_4a2fdf2dc8284d5f8d070006","tool":"write","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"filePath":"/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-tigeyzp1/custom_metadata.py","content":"from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")

projectPrim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project", "Xform")
stage.SetDefaultPrim(projectPrim)

projectPrim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
projectPrim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")

projectPrim.SetAssetInfoByKey("name", "hero_asset")
projectPrim.SetAssetInfoByKey("identifier", "assets/hero/v003/hero.usd")

heroPrim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero", "Xform")
heroXform = UsdGeom.Xform(heroPrim)
heroXform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)

proxyPrim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy", "Xform")
proxyXform = UsdGeom.Xform(proxyPrim)
proxyXform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)

guidePrim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide", "Xform")
guideXform = UsdGeom.Xform(guidePrim)
guideXform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)

shotNameAttr = heroPrim.CreateAttribute("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String)
shotNameAttr.Set("SH010")

frameRangeAttr = heroPrim.CreateAttribute("custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2)
frameRangeAttr.Set(Gf.Vec2i(1001, 1100))

modelAPI = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(heroPrim)
modelAPI.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)

stage.GetRootLayer().Save()
print("Created pipeline.usda successfully")
"},"output":"Wrote file successfully.

files.content:
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, Sdf, Gf, Kind

stage = Usd.Stage.CreateNew("pipeline.usda")

projectPrim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project", "Xform")
stage.SetDefaultPrim(projectPrim)

projectPrim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:version", "2.1")
projectPrim.SetCustomDataByKey("pipeline:department", "lighting")

projectPrim.SetAssetInfoByKey("name", "hero_asset")
projectPrim.SetAssetInfoByKey("identifier", "assets/hero/v003/hero.usd")

heroPrim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero", "Xform")
heroXform = UsdGeom.Xform(heroPrim)
heroXform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.render)

proxyPrim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Proxy", "Xform")
proxyXform = UsdGeom.Xform(proxyPrim)
proxyXform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.proxy)

guidePrim = stage.DefinePrim("/Project/Hero/Guide", "Xform")
guideXform = UsdGeom.Xform(guidePrim)
guideXform.GetPurposeAttr().Set(UsdGeom.Tokens.guide)

shotNameAttr = heroPrim.CreateAttribute("custom:shotName", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.String)
shotNameAttr.Set("SH010")

frameRangeAttr = heroPrim.CreateAttribute("custom:frameRange", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Int2)
frameRangeAttr.Set(Gf.Vec2i(1001, 1100))

modelAPI = Usd.ModelAPI(heroPrim)
modelAPI.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)

stage.GetRootLayer().Save()
print("Created pipeline.usda successfully")
